name: Gavin Bonded Leather Storage Ottoman Brown - Christopher Knight Home
description:
Harmonizing the indulgence of a soft, inviting surface with convenient function, this ottoman bench boasts convenient storage space while offering your decor a stunning look. With tufted waffle stitching, a nailhead trim, and soft pressure hinges, this ottoman is an ideal addition to any home, adding class and function to your interior space with an elegant aesthetic that blends seamlessly. This ottoman will tie your home together with its versatility and chic looks, perfect for your living room, foyer, or bedroom.

CONTEMPORARY DESIGN: Featuring classic tufted waffle stitching and a stunning nailhead trim, our storage ottoman offers the look, feel, and design of a truly contemporary piece. With a minimalistic yet refined structure, this piece brings out a simplistic style that emphasizes comfort and functionality.

TUFTED WAFFLE STITCH: The tufted stitching in the lid offers an extra touch of sophistication that enhances its contemporary design. The waffle stitch pattern adds a bit of texture without sacrificing any comfort.

NAILHEAD ACCENTS: This storage ottoman spares no expense when it comes to its finishing details. Expertly styled, this piece has tasteful nailhead accents bordering the bottom. Each nailhead is individually applied for a beautiful, handmade touch.

STORAGE SPACE: This ottoman comes with ample storage space for all of your pillows and blankets. This uses pressure hinges so that the lid will stay open on its own and will also ensure a soft close.

DIMENSIONS: Choose an accessory that is the perfect size for you and your furniture. This storage ottoman is 50.85” W x 19.65” D x 15.75” H. You will love how much your space can transform with the simple addition of this charming ottoman
